name: Roasted Chicken and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 pound small red potatoes, unpeeled and each cut in half
8 medium chicken thighs without skin (about 2 pounds)
1 medium red pepper, cut into 6 wedges
1 medium green pepper, cut into 6 wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a 15-inch by 10-inch roasting pan or a 15-inch by 10-inch glass baking dish, toss the potatoes, carrots, onion, and garlic with olive oil, half teaspoon salt, half teaspoon dried rosemary, crushed, and quarter teaspoon black pepper. Cover the roasting pan.
3. Roast vegetables for 20 minutes.
4. Remove the pan from the oven; uncover it.
5. Add chicken and pepper wedges; toss with half teaspoon salt, quarter teaspoon dried rosemary, crushed, and quarter teaspoon black pepper.
6. Roast uncovered for 25 minutes; stir vegetables and chicken to brown evenly.
7. Continue roasting for 25 minutes longer or until vegetables are golden and juices run clear when chicken is pierced with a knife.
8. Add half cup hot water, stirring to loosen the brown from the bottom of the casserole.
9. Spoon sauce over chicken and vegetables to serve. If desired, cut through the skin of each garlic clove and spread the soft, sweet-tasting garlic over chicken and vegetables. Makes 4 main dish servings.
